qrcode.qrcodemobileinstructions:
1. Download QR Code to your photos, or take Screenshot of QR Code.
  2. Open your TTB app.
  3. Upload QR Code to TTB app to finish payment.
qrcode.qrcodeinstructions:
1. Scan QR Code to pay in your TTB app.
  2. Follow all instructions and Complete Payment in TTB app.
  3. Once submitted on TTB app, click the Submit button. You will receive a follow up email with your authorization status.
Note: Do NOT navigate away from this page while completing payment in TTB app. If you would like to Cancel payment, close out TTB app AND close out this QR code screen by selecting "Back" below.
